opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has been cramping so badly it doubles me over, I've thrown up four times tonight, and I haven't passed any gas since yesterday.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramping got much worse over the last couple of days and tonight I keep being sick and can't pass any wind at all — my belly feels swollen and tight.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tummy has been off for about four months, but the severe cramping ramped up over the last 48 hours and the vomiting started tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: four months of gradual change; last two days much worse; vomiting for the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: gripping, comes-and-goes cramping across the lower belly that doubles me over, now with a swollen, tight, bloated feeling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are severe and exhausting; being sick over and over has wiped me out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across the belly, more to the left side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the cramps come in waves; the swelling and being sick have been constant tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I can't get comfortable
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it seems worse after I try to eat or drink anything
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: over the past few months my bowels have been all over the place — bad constipation then bouts of loose motions — and I've noticed dark, tar-like poo on and off in the last month. I've also lost about 6 kg without trying and I've completely gone off my food.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like tonight before; the bowel changes have been creeping up over months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed tonight, too sore and drained from vomiting to move around

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular tablets, and I haven't started anything new or taken any strong painkillers that bung you up

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with spouse, who is with me tonight and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he has vomited four times tonight and it looks greenish-yellow; he is pale, sweaty and worn out
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer description over the phone, not a clinician observation

objective_data_offered.value: his belly looks visibly swollen and bloated on the phone camera
no gas or bowel motion passed since yesterday despite feeling the urge

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: mouth feels really dry and he goes lightheaded when he sits up
